programme.title: Colours of Sapphires
programme.desc: There's more to Sapphire than classic blue! Join us for a special selection of fine jewellery crafted with stunning sapphires in all colours from pink and purple to green and yellow!

programme.title: Morganite Gems
programme.desc: Morganite: a feminine gem with delicate pink tones is a must-have. TVSN presents classic pieces featuring this attractive stone. Perfect for gifting or adding to your own collection.

programme.title: Madagascan Mermaid Apatite
programme.desc: Dive into colour with NEW Madagascan Mermaid Apatite. Stunning ocean inspired hues and sparkling clarity make this gemstone a captivating addition to any jewellery collection.

programme.title: Mozambique Ruby
programme.desc: Experience the brilliance of Mozambique Ruby. Renowned for its stunning red hues and exceptional transparency. This premium variety of Ruby is all class. Don't miss this extraordinary gemstone.

programme.title: Brazilian Blue Topaz
programme.desc: Discover the allure of Brazilian London Blue Topaz. Renowned for its deep captivating colours. This stunning gemstone adds sophistication to any jewellery collection. Perfect for your style!

programme.title: Java Jepara Pallavine Gems
programme.desc: Rare gems with olive greens and golden highlights that are doubly refractive like Zircon. Crafted by cutters for brilliant sparkle and allure they originate from the Jepara meteorite.

programme.title: Colours of Sapphire
programme.desc: Tune in today as we explore the Colours of African Sapphire in a range of options, showcasing the amazing quality and beauty found within these gemstones from Africa.

programme.title: Nepalese Kyanite Gems
programme.desc: This stunning collection of bright blue vivid gemstones is a must see. Add one of these beautiful intensely coloured pieces to your collection!

programme.title: Brazilian Capelinha Sphene
programme.desc: Light up your collection with NEW Brazilian Capelinha Sphene. Known for its fiery brilliance and shifting colours. This rare gemstone brings unmatched sparkle and vibrant beauty to every piece.

programme.title: Turkish Purple Jade in Silver
programme.desc: Found only in the Bursa Province in Turkey's Marmara Region. Turkish Purple Jade is a uniquely beautiful twist on an ancient gemstone. Enjoy the beauty of this totally natural and unenhanced rare gem.

programme.title: Madagascan Color Change Garnet
programme.desc: Experience the magic of NEW Madagascan Colour Change Garnet. Unique gemstones that shift hue in different light. Add rare beauty with elegance and a touch of wonder to any jewellery collection.

programme.title: Australian Chrysocolla in Silver
programme.desc: Admire the captivating blues and greens of Chrysocolla. Beautifully set in sterling silver. Perfect for adding a touch of elegance and mystique to your jewellery collection.

programme.title: Nigerian Sunset Tourmaline
programme.desc: Accessorise with a rainbow of sparkling jewels for the magical finishing touch! From classic Diamonds to exotic Tanzanite, there s a world of gemset pieces waiting to be discovered at TVSN.

programme.title: Colours of Sapphires
programme.desc: There's more to Sapphire than classic blue! Join us for a special selection of fine jewellery crafted with stunning sapphires in all colours from pink and purple to green and yellow!

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Why is self-control so crucial for your spiritual growth? Today, Joyce wraps up this teaching on the fruit of the Spirit and reveals how this powerful fruit of the Spirit unlocks lasting peace, strength, and victory in life.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Aspiring Portland chef Cleo Morelli tries to win a food-truck competition while the competition tries to win her heart.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: For Philippino familes living in poverty, good education is a ticket to a new life filled with opportunity, so Eligen's family sacrificed a lot to make sure she got one. Her story is about making a difference in the lives of others.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church has a vision for a relatable, life-changing church based firmly in the bible, aiming to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Christians who run the spiritual race faithfully are diligently will receive rewards at the Judgment Seat of Christ.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Go into All The World Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team takes the gospel to London during the Coronation of King Charles.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Halting the Hateful Hand of Mister Malevolent
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.sub-title: Safety First: A Lesson about Obedience
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show

programme.desc: This stunning collection of bright blue vivid gemstones is a must see. Add one of these beautiful intensely coloured pieces to your collection!

programme.desc: It's time to learn all about our Burmese Violet Spinel. This beautiful coloured stone will make a great addition to your jewellery collection by adding that perfect pop of colour.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Born in Egypt, educated in Australia, author of over 40 books and this week Michael Youssef chats about his new book 'Saving Christianity on 'A Very Tall Man' with Gary Hoogvliet.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: A man involved in a horrific car crash is pronounced dead, only to come back to life an hour and a half later, claiming to have seen Heaven.

programme.title: Asbury Revival: Desperate for More
programme.desc: On February 8 2023, some students stayed after chapel at Asbury University and continued worshiping. And they kept going for 16 days.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Often people - even Christians - assume that heaven is going to be some boring place where nothing ever happens for all of eternity. But the Bible makes it clear that heaven will be anything but boring.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: A Strong Life/How to Handle Criticism and Praise
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Four Things God Wants Us to Lift Up (3)
programme.desc: In part three of Four Things God Wants Us to Lift Up, Pastor Bayless challenges you to obey Jesus' command: "Lift up your eyes."

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you enduring life-or enjoying it? Today, discover how the fruit of kindness can shift your attitude, heal relationships, and reflect God's love in action.

programme.title: The Pearl of Great Price
programme.desc: Jesus Christ is the pearl of great price, the most valuable discovery in all eternity. If you have Jesus, you have everything.

programme.title: Play the flute
programme.desc: Faced with an indifferent youth group, a new youth pastor (Brett Varvel) tries to motivate his students to read God's Word and get serious about their faith.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: A species of creatures known as 'thoriphants' rebel against their life of servitude and embark on a treacherous journey to find the fabled city of Uprights.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup (The Voice 2013) and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: HRH The Prince of Wales talks to Diane Louise Jordan about the challenges facing young people living in inner city London, and songwriter Lou Fellingham leads the contemporary worship in All Saints Church.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Not every measure of the health of a business has a line on the profit and loss sheet. It permeates and impacts on every area of businesses and a bad culture left untreated will impact the bottom line.

programme.title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
programme.desc: Based on the life of Sheila Johnson who was diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.desc: Designed for the busy woman. This chic and casual range uses high-quality textiles to create stylish pieces that take the stress out of dressing. Perfect for creative and timeless classics.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Four Things God Wants Us to Lift Up (3)
programme.desc: In part three of Four Things God Wants Us to Lift Up, Pastor Bayless challenges you to obey Jesus' command: "Lift up your eyes."

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What does it mean to live with goodness in a selfish world? Learn how goodness, rooted in God's grace, can shift your focus from self to service-and lead others to Him.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: HRH The Prince of Wales talks to Diane Louise Jordan about the challenges facing young people living in inner city London, and songwriter Lou Fellingham leads the contemporary worship in All Saints Church.

programme.title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
programme.desc: Based on the life of Sheila Johnson who was diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.

programme.title: Harriet Tubman: They Called Her Moses
programme.desc: Discover the real Harriet Tubman in this compelling documentary. Narrated by Alfrelynn Roberts it features expert interviews and remarkable early 20th century audio recordings of African-American spirituals sung by former slaves.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Tanya is a firefighter who also mentors young women coming up the ranks. Lacey and her team put together an epic beachside event that will honour Tanya and showcase the incredible work she has done.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Teen Justin has worked tirelessly to save nearly 80 acres in the Rainforests of Ecuador, home to many species of frogs. Lacey and her team are throwing him Rainforest Celebration to honour his efforts.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Sophie volunteers at Ride On Therapeutic Horsemanship Center, assisting young riders and caring for the animals. Now, Lacey teams up with Lisa and Marisa to celebrate Sophie with a pre-Bat Mitzvah Party at the Barn.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Prosper Through Prophetic Preaching Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Halting the Hateful Hand of Mister Malevolent
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.sub-title: Safety First: A Lesson about Obedience
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Karen and Stephen have a million dollars to find their dream home in Hobart. Pete and Jenny are also moving to Tasmania. The ferry's booked for six weeks time so the race is on to find a family home for $500,000.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce and Veronica help a couple with kids and a dog relocate from Alice Springs to Canberra. They also help first-time buyers find the middle ground between big dreams and a tight budget.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Veronica helps out newlyweds Erin and Allan, who have opposing views of where to live. And Bryce helps Ben and Lena find a home in the Macedon Ranges, but they'll need to make a few compromises.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Chad and Tahlia are first time buyers looking for a tree-change so their daughter can be closer to her grandparents. While Veronica's on a multimillion-dollar hunt on Sydney's exclusive lower north shore.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Two big challenges for two very different buyers. Newly married David and Marie need a four bedroom house for their blended family, while Gillian's finally leaving the family home.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Dana and Kev are living in cramped conditions with her parents while they look for a family home in Adelaide.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce helps Amy find her first inner-city pad, but her dream exceeds her budget. Joe and Suzanne are moving from Canberra to Melbourne; time is critical.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce and Veronica help Adam and Monique, who are buying their first home, while Garry and Linda want to find their dream house after years of extreme saving.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: It's an emotional property search with life-changing decisions. Bryce helps a stressed couple desperate for the simpler things in life, while Veronica helps dairy farmer Dave retire in Byron Bay.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 1 of 4

programme.title: Connect

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour TV talk show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.sub-title: Questions From The Husband, How Would Your Kids Describe You, Kid Influencers
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration. Which direction are you heading?

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries

programme.title: North to Home

programme.sub-title: St. Valentine - The OG of Love

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The annual evangelism conference led by Ray Comfort and the Living Waters crew.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Developing an attitude of contentment may not be easy, but the benefits are worth the effort. Discover today how to live a happier, more contented life.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Carmela prepares to lead her first solo mission with Mending Kids, providing medical care to sick children worldwide. Lacey sends her off with a surprise fiesta that brings her back to her Peruvian roots.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Sheri founded Happy Hats to bring joy back to sick children while they receive treatment. Lacey plans an elegant Tea Party to show how Happy Hats make a difference.

programme.title: Celebrations with Lacey Chabert
programme.desc: Dr Ifunanya Nweke founded Jazz Hands for Autism to empower neurodivergent creatives. Lacey plans to throw Ifu an incredible Christmas party to thank her for supporting the community.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: A Strong Life/How to Handle Criticism and Praise
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Blind Date Book Club
programme.desc: A Nantucket bookstore owner known for matching others finds love and direction in life after agreeing to review a famous author's new novel in her blind-date-with-a-book club after he visits her store.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Transformative Power Of God_s Word Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Go Frills
programme.desc: For lots of original songs and loads of fun, join the Frills family aboard their funky fun tour bus as they have exciting adventures, meet new people and present their awesome live rock show.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Night Owls and Early Birds is a new topical Bible study show from the creators of Owlegories. Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality. Three Chairs will make you think and smile.

programme.title: Towards Belief
programme.desc: Australian pastor and host, Karl Faase travels to the UK, USA and Australia to interview more than thirty leading authors, speakers and apologists as they seek to defuse the top belief blockers to the Christian faith.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Often people - even Christians - assume that heaven is going to be some boring place where nothing ever happens for all of eternity. But the Bible makes it clear that heaven will be anything but boring.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Escaping the Horrors of Domestic Violence - Part 1
programme.desc: Is healing possible after abuse? Join Joyce and friends for a powerful conversation with survivor Sandee Jo Crocker-her story offers real hope and strength.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places, and events that launched the Christian faith.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Everyone: Amsterdam 23
programme.desc: This 3 day conference held in the Netherlands in 2023 was packed with many great speakers around the world. All with one heart and mission to reach EVERYONE worldwide with Christ.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
